{{CargoRelic
|name=Napoleon Painting
|rank=AAA
|affct=ART
|birthday=09-20
|source=Fragment Crafting (1.6%), Lottery Machine (0.03%), Wishing (0.14%), Relic Forge (80 Relic RF)
|description=On Sep 20, 1805, this painting marked by Napoleon's great style was finally completed. 

David painted 5 portraits of Napoleon, and he was most satisfied with the last one. This painting depicts the War of the Second Coalition, where Napoleon led an army of 40,000 across the Alps by taking a shortcut through the St. Bernard Pass into Italy. Napoleon's red cloak was striking, he was pointing his fingers to the peak while riding on a horse. In the background are generals holding sabers who are covered by the horse tail. But in reality. Napoleon rode a donkey instead.

[Basic Info]

Size: 261x221 cm<br>Material: Canvas<br>Type: Portrait Oil Painting<br>Collected by: Chateau de Malmaison
|fame=42
|art=72
|fth=44
|civ=47
|tech=38
|ss1=Per Realm conquered, Snail HP +300<br>Per Realm conquered, Snail ATK +30<br>Realms Conquered: 8/8
|ss2=Per Realm conquered, Snail HP +400<br>Per Realm conquered, Snail ATK +40<br>Realms Conquered: 8/8
|ss3=Per Realm conquered, Snail HP +500<br>Per Realm conquered, Snail ATK +50<br>Realms Conquered: 8/8
|ss4=Per Realm conquered, Snail HP +700<br>Per Realm conquered, Snail ATK +70<br>Realms Conquered: 8/8
|ss5=Per Realm conquered, Snail HP +900<br>Per Realm conquered, Snail ATK +90<br>Realms Conquered: 8/8
|ss7=Per Realm conquered, Snail HP +900<br>Per Realm conquered, Snail ATK +90<br>Realms Conquered: 8/8<br>Snail ATK +70 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Compass skill II.png|50px]] Place in Exploration Compass: In explorations, 2x B-Tad Drops +7.5%
|skill2=[[File:Compass skill II.png|50px]] Place in Exploration Compass: In explorations, 2x Food Drops +7.5%
}}

[[Category:Relics]]
[[Category:Purple Relics]]
[[Category:ART Relics]]
[[Category:Purple ART Relics]]
[[Category:HP Boost]]
[[Category:ATK Boost]]
[[Category:Exploration Compass Boost]]
[[Category:Tadpole Pond Boost]]
[[Category:Angel Cell Drop Boost]]
[[Category:Enhanced by Realms Conquered]]
[[Category:Berserker Boost]]
